queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between the absence of a checking account and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Investigation into the impact of critical credit history or other existing credits on the mitigation of credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Statistical examination of the relationship between negative checking account balances and decreased credit risk exposure.
